name: Chocolate Almond Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup sugar, 1/2 cup baking cocoa, and melted butter in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan and refrigerate.
3. In another mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sour cream, and remaining sugar until smooth.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in 1/2 teaspoon almond extract and the remaining baking cocoa.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes or until the center is almost set. Let it cool completely.
8. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours before serving.
9. In a separate bowl, whip the cream until it mounds slightly. Add the confectioner's sugar and remaining almond extract, then continue whipping until soft peaks form.
10. Spread the whipped cream evenly over the cheesecake.
11. Sprinkle with toasted almonds.
12. Store in the refrigerator.
